The '''Morgukai Shadow Army''' was an alleged [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] project that was researched in the [[Saleucami Cloning Complex|secret labs]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]s [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Overview==
Seeking to establish a viable counter-measure to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone army]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] recruited one of the last remaining [[Morgukai]], [[Bok]], using him as the [[Clone template/Legends|template]] for a new clone army. [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]] was given control of this operation, with [[Tol Skorr]] operating as his [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]. In addition to his role as the prime clone, [[Bok]] served as the primary training officer for the clones, tutoring the Shadow Army in [[Morgukai]] combat styles. To make them even deadlier, Bulq recruited [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin teachers]] from [[Anzat (species)|Anzat]] to further train the [[Morgukai]] clones in the arts of stealth and assassination. The necessary [[Saleucami Cloning Complex|cloning facilities]] were constructed in the [[Magma Caverns|magma chambers]] beneath the capital city on [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]], also doubling as the training ground and all powered by the geothermal power stations also built into these catacombs. The clones and their instructors were all equipped with [[Cortosis/Legends|Cortosis]] alloy blades, to allow them to combat [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], though the source of these weapons is unknown. According to the assassin trainer [[Rath Kelkko]], the Morgukai clones adapted quickly to the Anzati methods and techniques, though he noted that proper mastery required years of training and practice.<ref name="Trackdown">''[[Star Wars: Republic: Trackdown]]''</ref>

==History==
[[File:Battle_of_Saleucami.jpg|thumb|right|180px|The [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|Siege of Saleucami]].]]
Unfortunately for the Confederacy cause, the Shadow Army was prevented from leaving Saleucami with a [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|prolonged siege]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], which ended with their destruction.<ref name="The Siege of Saleucami">''[[Star Wars: Republic: Siege of Saleucami]]''</ref>
